questions: Among privately held companies, which has the most employees?
Averaging the growth rates for Q1 through Q4, which company comes out on top?
Which company produced the largest total revenue across the entire year (all four quarters added together)?
Which firm has the most employees per million dollars of annual revenue?
Which company earning more than $1B total across all quarters has the worst satisfaction rating?
Which company with a decline in Q3 carries the highest D/E ratio?
Among firms that remained private, which has the best satisfaction rating?
Which company had the largest revenue increase from Q1 to Q4 (Q4 revenue minus Q1 revenue)?
Among companies founded before 2001, which posted the strongest growth in the closing quarter?
Which publicly traded company IPO'd most recently?
constraints: Must include the headquarters city of the company that answers Question 9.
Must include the CEO's last name of the company that answers Question 6.
Must include the headquarters country of the company that answers Question 4.
Must include a prime number equal to nextPrime((employees of the answer to Question 9 mod 100) + 11), as digits.
Must include the equation "A+B=C" (digits, no spaces) where A=((Q1 revenue of the answer to Question 9 mod 90)+10) and B=((Q4 revenue of the answer to Question 4 mod 90)+10) and C=A+B.
Acrostic: the first letters of the first 8 words must spell the first 8 letters of (initials(Q9)+initials(Q6)+initials(Q4)+initials(Q3)), uppercased.
Tip: avoid extra punctuation-only "words"; words are split on spaces.
